name: Heroku
description: Heroku is a Platform as a Service that makes application deployment much simpler by abstracting away much of the infrastructure layer.
whyUseIt: Useful when speed, simplicity, and lower operational burden matter more than maximum infrastructure control.

vocabulary.definition: Heroku's unit for running an application process.

beginnerMistakes: Assuming simplicity means it fits every scale or cost profile
Ignoring the trade-off between speed and deep control
